framework.name: Default Spending Limits as Invisible Guardrails
framework.description: Stripe applies non-obvious default limits: 500 USD/day if no spending_limits set, and an unconfigurable 10,000 USD per-authorization ceiling. These 'training wheels' limits could unexpectedly block legitimate agent transactions without explicit configuration.
framework.raw_quote: Stripe automatically applies the following limits, which you can contact support to disable: If you don't set spending_limits, a default spending limit of 500 USD per day applies... an unconfigurable default spending limit of 10000 USD also applies to each authorization.
